etymology.description: semantic 亻(人) (rén, "person") + phonetic 由(由) (yóu) -> to urge to eat
etymology.interpretation: The character 侑(侑) (yòu, "to urge to eat") combines the semantic component 亻(人) (rén, "person"), indicating actions relating to people, with the phonetic component 由(由) (yóu), providing the sound. The action involves a person encouraging or prompting someone else to eat.
